recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: Sink or Swim
recommendations.overview: 40-year-old Bertrand has been suffering from depression for the last two years and is barely able to keep his head above water. Despite the medication he gulps down all day, every day, and his wife's encouragement, he is unable to find any meaning in

recommendations.title: Snow Cake
recommendations.overview: A drama focused on the friendship between a high-functioning autistic woman and a man who is traumatized after a fatal car accident.

recommendations.title: The Swallows of Kabul
recommendations.overview: Summer 1998—Kabul under Taliban rule. Zunaira and Mohsen are young and in love. Despite the daily violence and misery, they hope for a better future. One day, a foolish gesture causes life to take an irrevocable turn.

recommendations.title: Legend No. 17
recommendations.overview: Biopic of Russian ice hockey legend Valeri Kharlamov from early childhood, rising to the pinnacle of the sport and his untimely death

recommendations.title: Marilyn's Eyes
recommendations.overview: Clara and Diego, under the guidance of the psychiatrist of a day rehabilitation center for disturbed people who attend, decide to transform the treatment center into a restaurant, involving all their other companions.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A man, crippled in an accident, returns to the woods after rehabilitation, certain that he'll not see Bigfoot again.

recommendations.title: Water Lilies

recommendations.title: Natural Born Killers
recommendations.overview: Two victims of traumatized childhoods become lovers and serial murderers irresponsibly glorified by the mass media.

recommendations.title: My King
recommendations.overview: Tony is admitted to a rehabilitation center after a serious ski accident. Dependent on the medical staff and pain relievers, she takes time to look back on a turbulent relationship that she experienced with Georgio.
